title: Trends Aggregator Input
description: Fetch trending topics from multiple sources

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Which trend sources to fetch. Leave empty to fetch all sources.

googleGeo.title: Google Trends Region
googleGeo.description: ISO country code for Google Trends (e.g. US, JP, GB). Only used when 'google' is in sources.

limit.title: Result Limit per Source
limit.description: Maximum number of items to return per source (1-50). Default is 25.
